merged_findings.summary: acquire_many now returns partial results, breaking atomicity.
merged_findings.evidence:
+        return results
-        return results if len(results) == n else []
merged_findings.rule: Removing a length guard breaks all-or-nothing semantics.

merged_findings.summary: Hardcoded fallback password introduced as module-level constant.
merged_findings.rule: Credential material must not appear in source code.

merged_findings.summary: New file missing SPDX license header.
merged_findings.rule: New source files must carry SPDX-License-Identifier per AGENTS.md.
